purpose: find-in-long-doc FNR (does the auditor FIND the injected bug with no pointing question)

module_30.code_truth: croparea default is simple_apr24 (config/default.cfg); detail_apr24 is the non-default sibling.

module_51.injected_bug: vm_manure_recycling stated as declared by Module 50
module_51.code_truth: vm_manure_recycling is declared+populated in Module 55 (awms); Module 50 only reads it.

module_42.code_truth: water_demand default is all_sectors_aug13 (config/default.cfg); agr_sector_aug13 is non-default.

module_70.code_truth: livestock default is fbask_jan16 (config/default.cfg); fbask_jan16_sticky is non-default.

module_13.injected_bug: vm_tau stated as at super-region level (h)
module_13.code_truth: vm_tau(j,tautype) is at CLUSTER level j (13_tc/endo_jan22/declarations.gms:13), not super-region h.

module_38.injected_bug: vm_cost_prod_crop stated as consumed by Module 17
module_38.code_truth: vm_cost_prod_crop is consumed by Module 11 (q11_cost_reg) and Module 36; not Module 17.

carbon_balance.injected_bug: soilc/carbon stock stated as serial M52 -> M56 hand-off
carbon_balance.code_truth: M52 and M56 are PARALLEL readers of vm_carbon_stock; M56 reads it directly (q56_emis_pricing_co2), not via M52.
